title: The Horror Update Pack by Apollo
description:
Embark the scary part of Minecraft, this mods brings a mobs, structures and mechanics
Modpack by Apollo
body:
**_It's pretty scary! T-T_**

> It requires Java 17
> &
> Fabric Loader 0.16.10

This modpack contains From the Fog, Cave Dweller, Weeping Angels & other scary mods but I just added performance mods to gain more performance while playing it, reducing stuttering.

(Soon to add side by side comparison with the default modpack with the added performance mods)

I could not update this modpack to the latest version of Minecraft due to some mods that has still no updates.

### More about this
The modpack was created by Apollo from YouTube, but I just added more quality-of-life mods and, most importantly, performance mods, giving smoothness and immersiveness.

Check out **Appolo's Youtube Channel** for making this modpack:
[Youtube • @Apollo-official](https://www.youtube.com/@Apollo-official)

Check out the video from Appolo's Channel of this Modpack:
[I Made a SCARY Minecraft Update](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-3M8QTpaNWo)
